title: Good: Local storage for link-layer address avoids const-cast UB
description: lichen_l2.c:109-114 and :426-432 copy EUI-64 to iface_link_addr rather than casting away const from lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64(). Comment explains Zephyr stores the pointer directly and might write to it. This defensive copy prevents UB.
close_reason: Positive review observation recorded; no implementation action required.
